comments.author: github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ❌ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-24 18:47:53 PT

Found 1 violation: incomplete parameter removal. The `--branch-slug` parameter was removed from `setup_impl.py` but the calling command `.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md` still references it.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **Parameter removal completeness** → loaded [Parameter Addition Checklist](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/main/docs/learned/cli/parameter-addition-checklist.md) (inverse pattern)

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found (2 matches in diff are in unchanged context lines from setup_impl_from_issue.py)
✅ `next()` without default - **RESOLVED** (previously flagged violation is now fixed)

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
❌ **Parameter removal completeness** - Found incomplete removal of `--branch-slug` parameter

### Violations Summary
- **`.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md:74`**: Stale parameter reference. Line contains `erk exec setup-impl --issue <ISSUE_ARG> --branch-slug="${BRANCH_SLUG}"` but `--branch-slug` was removed from `setup-impl` in this PR. This invocation will fail with "no such option" error.
  
  **Fix**: Remove `--branch-slug="${BRANCH_SLUG}"` from line 74 of `.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md`
  
  **Related pattern**: When removing parameters, Step 5 of the [Parameter Addition Checklist](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/blob/main/docs/learned/cli/parameter-addition-checklist.md#step-5-verify-all-invocation-sites) applies in reverse - all invocation sites must be updated.

### Files Reviewed
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: 0 violations (correctly updated)
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/setup_impl.py`: 0 violations (parameter correctly removed)
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_setup_impl.py`: 0 violations (test correctly updated, previous EAFP violation resolved)
- `.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md`: 1 violation (not modified in this PR, but contains stale reference)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-24 18:47:53 PT**: Found incomplete parameter removal. The `--branch-slug` parameter was removed from setup_impl but `.claude/commands/erk/plan-implement.md` still references it on line 74. Previous EAFP violation (next() without default) has been resolved.
- **2026-02-24 18:43:23 PT**: Found 1 EAFP violation in test file (already flagged by github-actions). Reference docs correctly updated for parameter removal.

</details>
